mapper.select:
SELECT c.id, c.course_name, c.description, c.coach_id, u.username AS coach_name, u.avatar AS coach_avatar, c.category, c.start_time, c.end_time, c.capacity, c.booked_count, (c.capacity - c.booked_count) AS remaining_count, c.status, c.image_url FROM fitness_course c LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON c.coach_id = u.id WHERE c.deleted = false
AND c.category = #{query.category}
AND c.start_time::DATE >= #{query.startDate}::DATE
AND c.end_time::DATE <= #{query.endDate}::DATE
AND c.course_name LIKE '%' || #{query.keyword} || '%'
AND c.course_name LIKE '%' || #{query.courseName} || '%'
AND c.coach_id = #{query.coachId}
ORDER BY c.start_time ASC

SELECT c.id, c.course_name, c.description, c.coach_id, u.username AS coach_name, u.avatar AS coach_avatar, c.category, c.start_time, c.end_time, c.capacity, c.booked_count, (c.capacity - c.booked_count) AS remaining_count, c.status, c.image_url FROM fitness_course c LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON c.coach_id = u.id WHERE c.id = #{courseId} AND c.deleted = false
